title: Traditional Songs of the Great Lakes Region
description: A field recording of traditional songs performed by a group of elder women from the Burundian community at Dzaleka. The recording includes three songs: a harvest celebration song, a lullaby passed down through generations, and a wedding procession chant. The performers share brief explanations of each song's cultural significance between performances.
